Container.Name: hallway-dash
Container.Overview: Self-hosted, always-on wall-display dashboard for a hallway/kitchen TV (portrait orientation). Clock, date, current weather + 6-day forecast, sunrise/sunset, indoor temp/humidity (via Home Assistant), a rolling 4-week calendar (personal events + waste/bin-collection days), a NINA/BBK civil-protection alert banner, a rotating monthly background photo, and a random joke. All third-party API calls happen server-side, so your Home Assistant token never reaches the display. Every field below is optional and degrades gracefully if left blank.

Variable.Name: LOCATION_LABEL
Variable.Description: Display name shown next to the current weather

Variable.Name: CALENDAR_ICS_URL
Variable.Description: ICS feed URL for your personal calendar (leave blank to hide)

Variable.Name: WASTE_ICS_URL
Variable.Description: ICS feed URL for waste/bin-collection days (leave blank to hide; renders as amber pills)

Variable.Name: AGS_CODE
Variable.Description: 12-digit Amtlicher Gemeindeschluessel for NINA/BBK civil-protection alerts (leave blank to disable)

Variable.Name: JOKE_API_URL
Variable.Description: Joke source (plain-text response expected); falls back to JokeAPI.dev automatically if unreachable

Variable.Name: HA_URL
Variable.Description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8123 (leave blank to hide indoor stat)

Variable.Name: HA_TEMP_ENTITY
Variable.Description: Entity ID of your indoor temperature sensor

Variable.Name: HA_HUMIDITY_ENTITY
Variable.Description: Entity ID of your indoor humidity sensor

Variable.Name: ACCENT_COLOR
Variable.Description: Hex accent color used for bin-day pills, today's date circle, and the "Heute" label

Volume.Description: Folder containing 01.jpg ... 12.jpg monthly background photos (missing months fall back to a placeholder automatically)
